requiredTextFields.title: Full Lucky Aura Card
requiredTextFields.message: Warm presence can turn a small exchange into a memorable one.
requiredTextFields.outfit: Use one playful accent and keep the rest effortless.
requiredTextFields.beauty: Let one feature catch light while the rest stays natural.
requiredTextFields.social: Join the first friendly circle and ask what made their week brighter.
requiredTextFields.ritual: Smile at yourself once before you enter the room.
requiredTextFields.avoid: Avoid performing for people who are not meeting your energy.
requiredTextFields.caption: Today I am carrying golden comet aura.
